EA SPORTSŌäó PGA TOURŌäó Deluxe Edition

EA SPORTSŌäó PGA TOURŌäó Deluxe Edition includes:

- EA SPORTSŌäó PGA TOURŌäó
- 1500 PGA TOUR POINTS

About the Game

Tee off at Augusta National where you can compete for a Green Jacket. Play unique challenges and complete quests inspired by the Masters. Access exciting new content, golf gear drops to customize your golfer, and online tournaments to test your skills on the course.

The exclusive home of the Majors, EA SPORTS PGA TOUR features Pure Strike for superior golf gameplay, powered by ShotLink┬«, and unrivaled access to the worldŌĆÖs most exclusive golf courses.

  • Home of the Majors ŌĆö EA SPORTS PGA TOUR is the exclusive home of the Majors, including the Masters Tournament, the PGA Championship, the U.S. Open Championship, and The Open Championship.

  • Pure Strike powered by ShotLink┬« ŌĆö Powered by official PGA TOUR ShotLink┬« and TrackMan data, Pure Strike provides unique golf swings with a fluid feel and realistic outcomes on every golf shot. Pure Strike combines golfer-specific tendencies with unique Course Dynamics and revolutionized Ball Behavior for the premier golf gameplay experience.

  • Your career, your way ŌĆö As your golf game improves, so does your path to becoming a Major champion. Create and customize a golfer, develop your skill set with new Shot Types, gain deeper knowledge as you play, and learn to attack every course like a pro.

  • The worldŌĆÖs most exclusive courses ŌĆö The tee is yours at 30 courses, including some of the worldŌĆÖs most exclusive, designed in stunning quality with FrostbiteŌäó so you can enjoy more of golfŌĆÖs finer details than ever before.
